rules.summary: IP ownership or assignment may be broader than the deal requires.
rules.why_risky: The clause may transfer reusable materials, background IP, or unpaid work product.
rules.suggested_question: Can IP transfer apply only to paid deliverables and preserve background IP/reusable tools?
false_positive_checks: check whether the document actually involves creative/software/content deliverables
check whether background IP is carved out

rules.summary: Software license rights may be restricted or interruptible.
rules.why_risky: Access can be suspended or restricted without enough process or transition protection.
rules.suggested_question: Can suspension require notice/cure and preserve data export after termination?
false_positive_checks: check if suspension only applies to security emergencies
check if data export survives termination
